meta.title: KishanSaathi – Your farm, understood by science

hero.description: We check your field and weather, then tell you what to do next.
hero.stats: No complex terms — just clear advice for your crop.

intelligence.heading: Everything your farm needs, in one place
intelligence.subheading: No agronomist required. No expensive consultants. Just your phone and your field.

cards.title: Live NDVI Crop Health Map
cards.description: Draw your farm boundary once. Get a color-coded satellite overlay every week — green means thriving, red means act now. Powered by ESA Sentinel-2 at 10m resolution. Satellite · Agromonitoring API.

cards.title: 7-Day Weather Forecast
cards.description: Hyper-local rainfall, soil moisture, temperature, and evapotranspiration for your exact GPS coordinates. Not a city forecast — your field forecast. Open-Meteo API · Free.

assistant.heading: Market Price Trends + Loan Eligibility — No CIBIL needed
paragraphs: Live mandi prices from Agmarknet for your crop and nearest market. See price history as a line chart, and best/worst/expected yield as a bar chart before you decide what to grow. Agmarknet · data.gov.in.

Indian farmers don't have credit scores. KishanSaathi generates a crop-health-based eligibility report using your NDVI score, land size, and predicted yield — something your local bank can actually use. For local banks & cooperatives.

descriptionLines: Change your crop. Adjust irrigation. See how profit, yield, and risk scores shift in real time. Backed by SimPy, Prophet, and XGBoost.

Ask: "which crop should I grow this rabi season?", "why is my NDVI score low this week?", "when is the best time to irrigate?", "मेरी फसल की स्थिति कैसी है?", "ਮੈਨੂੰ ਕਿਹੜੀ ਖਾਦ ਪਾਉਣੀ ਚਾਹੀਦੀ ਹੈ?", and "What's the best price I can expect for wheat?"

featureCards.title: 01 Draw your farm · 02 We pull satellite data
featureCards.description: Open the map, draw your field boundary with your finger. We save the polygon and link it to your account. Then our backend fetches the latest Sentinel-2 image for your polygon and computes NDVI — a precise vegetation health score.

featureCards.title: 03 AI builds dashboard · 04 Alerts run automatically
featureCards.description: Crop health score, weather forecast, price trends, risk level, and loan eligibility are calculated and displayed instantly. Every 6 hours, KishanSaathi checks NDVI and weather thresholds, then sends push notifications if drought or heavy rain is detected.

stories.heading: A loan report your bank will understand
subheadingLines: Most Indian farmers are denied credit because they have no formal financial history. KishanSaathi turns your satellite data into a structured crop-health report — the new credit score for agriculture.
NDVI-based scoring, predicted yield, risk levels, and bank-ready PDF.

cards.description: NDVI-based vegetation health index for your exact land parcel. Predicted yield and revenue range for next harvest, powered by Prophet forecasting.
Risk level: drought probability, pest likelihood, flood exposure. Downloadable PDF report formatted for cooperative banks and Kisan Credit Card applications.
Farmer: Gurpreet Singh · Land size: 3.2 acres · Ludhiana · Current crop: Wheat (Rabi) · NDVI: 0.61 — Good · Predicted yield: 18–22 quintals · Risk level: Moderate.

subLines: A background scheduler checks your farm's NDVI and weather every 6 hours — 24/7, no action needed from you.
Drought Alert: NDVI below 0.3 with rainfall deficit for 14+ days.
Heavy Rain Warning: Open-Meteo forecasts above 50mm in the next 24h.

featureCards.title: Pest Risk Alert
featureCards.description: High humidity above 80% with warm nights above 22°C can trigger fungal disease and pest outbreak.
featureCards.linkText: Price Opportunity Alert: sell when mandi prices cross the 90-day average ›

featureCards.title: Notifications delivered via FCM
featureCards.description: Mobile push + in-app toast notifications, no SMS charges, fully automatic every 6 hours.

brand.title: KishanSaathi
brand.description: Satellite intelligence and AI, built for the Indian farmer.

footer.statusLine: Satellite data: ESA Sentinel-2 · Weather: Open-Meteo · Prices: Agmarknet
footer.copyright: © 2024 KishanSaathi. Built with purpose for Indian agriculture.
